indication: TAFINLAR is indicated, in combination with trametinib, for the treatment of patients with locally advanced or metastatic anaplastic thyroid cancer (ATC) with BRAF V600E mutation and with no satisfactory locoregional treatment options.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to dabrafenib in combination with trametinib for the treatment of patients with locally advanced or metastatic anaplastic thyroid cancer (ATC) with BRAF V600E mutation, as detected by an FDA-approved test, and with no satisfactory locoregional treatment options.
raw_cancer_type: locally advanced or metastatic anaplastic thyroid cancer (ATC)

document.name: Tafinlar (dabrafenib) [package insert]. FDA.
